summary: Tested 3 P0 bug fixes + Employee Progress Report feature. All tests passed. Admin login with Raghav2026 works, Map shows 52 properties for Bajigar Dera with GPS markers, PDF upload endpoint returns success, Employee Progress Report has Overall column sorted descending.
passed_tests: Admin login with username=admin, password=Raghav2026 returns 200 with token
Admin login with wrong password returns 401
GET /api/map/properties?colony=Bajigar Dera returns 52 properties with lat/lon
GET /api/map/properties with empty colony returns properties (all areas)
GET /api/admin/employee-progress returns employees with overall_completed field
Employee progress data sortable by overall_completed descending (2841, 583, 430, 9, 5...)
POST /api/admin/bills/upload-pdf accepts PDF and returns batch_id
GET /api/map/colonies returns 6 colonies including Bajigar Dera
Frontend login flow works - redirects to /select-town after login
Town selection (Thanesar/THS) works - redirects to /admin dashboard
Dashboard Employee Progress Report table has columns: Employee, Role, Today, Overall, Assigned, Completed, Pending, Progress, Actions
Employee Progress Report sorted by Overall column descending (Test Employee UI: 2841, Test Surveyor: 583, Ajit Singh: 430)
Property Map page loads with colony selector dropdown
Colony dropdown shows: All Areas, Bajigar Dera, Kirti Nagar, Sector 5, T.P.S 8B, T.P.S. 5, Vashisht Colony
Selecting Bajigar Dera shows 52 properties with GPS on map
Map stats cards show: Total 52, With GPS 52, Completed 52, Residential 29, Commercial 19, Mix Use 3
seed_data_creation: None - used existing database with 5315 properties
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three P0 bugs verified fixed: (1) Admin password changed to Raghav2026 in MongoDB nstu_master.users collection. (2) Map.js fetchPropertiesByColony now handles ALL_AREAS correctly - keeps value and passes empty string to API. (3) PDF upload endpoint works - tested with minimal PDF, returns batch_id and bill count. Employee Progress Report has Overall column (overall_completed from API) sorted descending. X-Town-Code: THS header required for all town-specific API calls.
